tasks.label: Build: Debug
tasks.detail: 🔨 Compile the Luna2D engine in debug mode — fast compile with full debug symbols. Default build task (Ctrl+Shift+B).

tasks.label: Build: Release
tasks.detail: 🔨 Compile with opt-level 3 + LTO enabled. Use this for distribution builds and performance measurement.

tasks.label: Build: Check (fast)
tasks.detail: ⚡ Type-check and resolve the crate without producing a binary — much faster than a full build. Use during active development.

tasks.label: Run Debug: Pick Example
tasks.detail: 🐛 Build (debug) and run a chosen example — pick from the list.

tasks.label: Run Release: Pick Example
tasks.detail: 🚀 Build (release, LTO) and run a chosen example — pick from the list.

tasks.label: Test: All
tasks.detail: 🧪 Run the full test suite (unit + integration). All tests must pass before committing. Default test task.

tasks.label: Test: All (verbose)
tasks.detail: 🧪 Run the full test suite and print captured stdout/stderr for every test case (--nocapture).

tasks.label: Test: Math module
tasks.detail: 🧮 Run only math-related tests — Vec2, Mat3, Rect, distance, clamp, and fast math helpers.

tasks.label: Test: Physics module
tasks.detail: ⚙️  Run only physics integration tests — bodies, world stepping, and AABB collision resolution.

tasks.label: Test: Graphics module
tasks.detail: 🎨 Run only graphics integration tests — color, camera transforms, and draw command processing.

tasks.label: Test: Lua bindings
tasks.detail: 🌙 Run only Lua binding tests — exercises the full luna.* API surface headlessly (no window).

tasks.label: Test: Audio module
tasks.detail: 🎵 Run only audio integration tests — source loading and mixer state (no playback in CI).

tasks.label: Test: Input module
tasks.detail: 🎮 Run only input integration tests — keyboard and mouse state machine.

tasks.label: Lint: Clippy
tasks.detail: 🔍 Run Clippy lints against all targets. Must report 0 warnings before any commit.

tasks.label: Lint: Clippy (deny warnings)
tasks.detail: 🚫 Run Clippy in CI-strict mode (-D warnings) — every warning is a compile error. Use before pushing.

tasks.label: Format: Apply
tasks.detail: 📐 Auto-format all Rust source files with rustfmt (rewrites in place). Safe to run at any time.

tasks.label: Format: Check
tasks.detail: 📐 Verify all files are already correctly formatted without modifying them. Used in CI and the full quality gate.

tasks.label: Quality Gate: Full
tasks.detail: ✅ Run the complete quality gate: fmt check → clippy → all tests. All three must pass before any push to main.

tasks.label: Lua API: Generate Reference
tasks.detail: 📝 Run tools/docs/gen_lua_api.py to regenerate docs/lua_api_reference_generated.md from docstrings in src/lua_api/*.rs

tasks.label: Lua API: Check Coverage
tasks.detail: ✓ Run tools/docs/gen_lua_api.py --check to validate all 77 Lua functions have docstrings. Exit code 1 if any missing.

tasks.label: Lua API: Add Docstrings (Setup)
tasks.detail: 🔧 Run tools/fix/add_lua_docstrings.py to auto-add /// docstrings from inline comments. Run once during project setup.

tasks.label: Docs: Open in Browser
tasks.detail: 📖 Generate rustdoc for luna2d and open the HTML output in the default browser (cargo doc --open).

tasks.label: Docs: Collect API (Python)
tasks.detail: 📝 Run tools/docs/collect_docs.py to scan src/ and regenerate docs/api_generated.md with all public API items and doc comments.

tasks.label: Docs: Report Missing Docs
tasks.detail: 📋 Run tools/docs/collect_docs.py --report-missing to list every public item that lacks a /// doc comment.

tasks.label: Docs: Suggest Missing Docstrings
tasks.detail: 💡 Run tools/docs/collect_docs.py --suggest to print starter /// doc lines for every undocumented public item.

tasks.label: Docs: Coverage Report
tasks.detail: 📊 Run tools/audit/doc_coverage.py to show docstring coverage for all Rust public items and Lua API bindings. Writes docs/logs/doc_coverage.json.

tasks.label: Docs: Coverage Check (Missing)
tasks.detail: 🔍 Run tools/audit/doc_coverage.py --report-missing to list all public items missing /// doc comments. Exits 1 if any found.

tasks.label: Docs: Generate Test Docs
tasks.detail: 🧪 Run tools/docs/gen_test_docs.py to generate docs/test_docs.md — a human-readable description of all tests and coverage gaps. Requires docs/logs/test_coverage.json (run 'Docs: Test Coverage' first).

tasks.label: Docs: Test Coverage
tasks.detail: 📊 Run tools/audit/test_coverage.py to analyse Rust and Lua API test coverage. Writes docs/logs/test_coverage.json.

tasks.label: Docs: Full Pipeline
tasks.detail: 🚀 Run tools/gen_all_docs.py to regenerate ALL documentation: API refs, test catalog, coverage analytics, wiki cheatsheet.

tasks.label: Install: Local (Windows)
tasks.detail: 📦 Build release binary and install luna.exe to %USERPROFILE%\bin. Copies demos/ too. Run once — then use 'Run (Installed):' tasks.

tasks.label: Install: Local (Linux / macOS)
tasks.detail: 📦 Build release binary and install luna2d to /usr/local/bin. Copies demos/ folder. May require sudo.

tasks.label: Uninstall: Local (Windows)
tasks.detail: 🗑️  Remove luna.exe from %USERPROFILE%\bin and the installed demos/ folder.

tasks.label: Run (Installed): Hello World
tasks.detail: 🌙 Run demos/hello_world with the installed luna2d binary (no recompile). Run 'Install: Local (Windows)' first.

tasks.label: Run (Installed): Physics Demo
tasks.detail: 🌙 Run demos/physics_demo with the installed luna2d binary (no recompile).

tasks.label: Run (Installed): Sprites
tasks.detail: 🌙 Run demos/sprites with the installed luna2d binary (no recompile).

tasks.label: Run (Installed): Splash Screen
tasks.detail: 🌙 Launch the installed luna2d binary with no game argument — displays the Luna2D splash screen.

tasks.label: Run Debug: Splash (drag-drop ready)
tasks.detail: ⚡ Launch the debug binary from build/debug WITHOUT rebuilding — fast startup for drag-drop folder loading. Build once first with 'Build: Debug'.

tasks.label: Run Release: Splash (drag-drop ready)
tasks.detail: ⚡ Launch the release binary from build/release WITHOUT rebuilding — fastest startup for drag-drop testing. Build once first with 'Build: Release'.

tasks.label: Build + Run Debug: Splash
tasks.detail: 🔨 Rebuild debug binary then launch splash screen — guarantees you run the latest code. Use this when in doubt about stale binaries.

tasks.label: Build + Run Release: Splash
tasks.detail: 🔨 Rebuild release binary then launch splash screen — use before drag-drop testing after code changes.

tasks.label: Assets: Generate Splash
tasks.detail: 🎨 Run tools/assets/gen_splash.py to (re)generate assets/splash.png (800×600 moon/space theme). Requires: pip install Pillow.

tasks.label: Assets: Generate Icon
tasks.detail: 🎨 Run tools/assets/gen_icon.py to (re)generate assets/icon.ico (multi-size) and assets/icon.png (256×256). Requires Pillow.

tasks.label: Assets: Generate All
tasks.detail: 🎨 Regenerate both the splash PNG and the icon files in one step. Re-build afterwards to embed them.

tasks.label: Dist: Package Windows
tasks.detail: 🚀 Release build → dist/luna2d-windows-x86_64/ folder + .zip archive. Output is ready to distribute to end users.

tasks.label: Dist: Package Windows (skip build)
tasks.detail: 🚀 Re-package using an already-compiled release binary — skips cargo build. Faster for iteration.

tasks.label: Dist: Package Linux / macOS
tasks.detail: 🚀 Release build → dist/luna2d-<os>-<arch>/ folder + .tar.gz archive. Run in WSL or a Linux/macOS shell.

tasks.label: Dist: NSIS Installer (Windows)
tasks.detail: 📦 Build a Windows installer from tools/dist/installer.nsi → dist/luna2d-0.4.0-setup.exe. Requires NSIS 3.x on PATH.

tasks.label: CAG: Validate All
tasks.detail: 🤖 Run tools/validate/cag_validate.py to check all agent, skill, prompt, and instruction files for schema compliance.
